## Summary

Adds 4 enrichment features to evaluation reports inspired by Marlowe Authors.ai report structure:

1. **Premise / Elevator Pitch** — 1–2 sentence hook extracted by LLM during Pass 3 synthesis
2. **Trigger Warnings (Content Warnings)** — Bulleted content advisory categories (graphic violence, sexual assault, substance abuse, etc.) extracted by LLM
3. **Reading Grade Level** — Flesch-Kincaid algorithmic computation (no LLM cost)
4. **Dialogue vs. Narrative Ratio** — Quoted-speech detection algorithm (no LLM cost)

All 4 features are:
- Defined in DREAM evaluation templates (short-form, long-form, multi-layer, benchmark, Story Ledger)
- Schema-typed in `EvaluationResultV2.enrichment`
- Extracted/computed in the pipeline (`computeEnrichment` orchestrator)
- Rendered on both `/evaluate/[jobId]` and `/reports/[jobId]` pages

Reading Grade Level includes critical disclaimer: "Measures prose complexity only—not audience appropriateness. Cross-reference Content Warnings above for suitability guidance."

## Scope

**Touches:**
- `schemas/evaluation-result-v2.ts` — added `enrichment` field
- `lib/evaluation/enrichment/` — new module (readingGradeLevel, dialogueRatio, computeEnrichment)
- `lib/evaluation/pipeline/types.ts` — added enrichment to SynthesisOutput
- `lib/evaluation/pipeline/prompts/pass3-synthesis.ts` — added enrichment schema to prompt
- `lib/evaluation/pipeline/runPass3Synthesis.ts` — extracts enrichment from LLM response
- `lib/evaluation/pipeline/runPipeline.ts` — wires enrichment into V2 adapter
- `lib/evaluation/processor.ts` — threads llmEnrichment to result builder
- `app/evaluate/[jobId]/page.tsx` — renders enrichment sections
- `app/reports/[jobId]/page.tsx` — renders enrichment sections
- `docs/templates/evaluation/` — all 3 evaluation templates updated
- `docs/benchmarks/templates/` — dream-longform-layered template updated
- `docs/benchmarks/story-ledger/` — Story Ledger 9-Layer template updated

**Does NOT touch:**
- Existing scoring logic, criteria, or pipeline routing
- Revise Queue or Story Ledger runtime
- Any existing tests (enrichment is additive/optional)

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

- Enrichment fields are fully optional (`enrichment?:`) — existing evaluations without enrichment render unchanged
- LLM extraction (premise + trigger warnings) piggybacks on existing Pass 3 call — near-zero marginal cost
- If LLM omits the `enrichment` block, algorithmic surfaces (grade level, dialogue ratio) still compute from manuscript text
- Reading Grade Level disclaimer is critical: prevents misinterpreting prose complexity as audience age recommendation

---

No-Pipeline-Impact: N/A — this PR adds a new pipeline surface (enrichment extraction) but does not modify existing scoring, routing, or quality gate logic. All new fields are optional and backward-compatible.
